form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind The Harris Hawk at Marburg over 2200m in a 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $4.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second behind Miss Bay King Cole at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 45 to 50 on April 10 at $11. Rates highly and can go one better.

form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into ninth behind Marty The Martian at this track over 2040m in a 3yo+ NR 54 to 62 on March 26 at $1.75. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 2138m at Albion Park, beaten 8 m by Cotchinellie (2:30.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 70 on March 17 at $8. Best form would see her back in the winner's stall.
